spec.description: Real-time traffic incident monitoring powered by TomTom Traffic Incidents API
Live count of active traffic incidents from TomTom API
spec.title: Total Active Accidents

spec.root_selector: [(.incidents // []) | group_by(.propiedades_extra.hospital_asignado // "Desconocido")[] | {"Hospital": (.[0].propiedades_extra.hospital_asignado // "Desconocido"), "Sin retraso": (map(select(.properties.magnitudeOfDelay == 0)) | length), "Leve": (map(select(.properties.magnitudeOfDelay == 2)) | length), "Moderado": (map(select(.properties.magnitudeOfDelay == 3)) | length), "Crítico": (map(select(.properties.magnitudeOfDelay == 4)) | length)}] | sort_by(.Hospital)

spec.description: Comparativa apilada de niveles de severidad por hospital de referencia
spec.title: Severidad por Hospital — Desglose Comparativo

spec.description: Combined traffic delay from all active incidents
spec.title: Total Delay Time

spec.root_selector:
[(.incidents // [])[] | . as $i | {
  "lat": (if ($i.geometry.coordinates[0] | type) == "number" then $i.geometry.coordinates[1] else $i.geometry.coordinates[0][1] end), 
  "lon": (if ($i.geometry.coordinates[0] | type) == "number" then $i.geometry.coordinates[0] else $i.geometry.coordinates[0][0] end), 
  "h_lat": $i.propiedades_extra.h_lat,
  "h_lon": $i.propiedades_extra.h_lon,
  "hospital": $i.propiedades_extra.hospital_asignado,
  "description": ($i.properties.events[0].description // "Incidente")
}]

## 📊 Análisis Estadístico de Incidentes
Distribuciones en tiempo real de los incidentes activos por región hospitalaria, severidad y tipo de evento.

spec.root_selector: [(.incidents // []) | group_by(.properties.magnitudeOfDelay)[] | {severidad: (.[0].properties.magnitudeOfDelay | if . == 0 then "0 · Sin retraso" elif . == 2 then "2 · Leve" elif . == 3 then "3 · Moderado" else "4 · Crítico" end), accidentes: length}]

spec.title: Distribución por Severidad
